headline: Built for Seismic
subheadline: AI-powered sales infrastructure to enhance global partnerships and address regulatory compliance in blockchain financial services

challenges.title: Regulatory Compliance
challenges.desc: Seismic faces strict international regulations for blockchain adoption. This slows global partnerships and increases compliance costs. Their encrypted platforms must balance privacy and legal standards.

challenges.title: Partnership Building
challenges.desc: Forging financial services partnerships is tough with 16 employees. Competition in blockchain makes trust-building essential. Global promotion requires targeted strategies to stand out.

challenges.title: Data Security
challenges.desc: Encrypted data on Seismic's platform risks transparency issues. Developers need secure on-chain solutions without bottlenecks. This affects novel financial product launches.

challenges.title: Market Expansion
challenges.desc: As a 2023 startup, Seismic must scale quickly in competitive sectors. International adoption involves cultural and regulatory barriers. AI integration is key to driving revenue growth.

deliverables.title: Compliance AI System
deliverables.desc: Builds automated tools for regulatory checks and integrates with Seismic's blockchain for real-time compliance monitoring

deliverables.title: Partnership Network
deliverables.desc: Creates a CRM system for managing global partnerships and integrates with existing encrypted platforms to streamline collaborations

deliverables.title: Sales Enablement Platform
deliverables.desc: Develops AI-driven content for marketing encrypted solutions and integrates with Seismic's app layer for targeted promotions

deliverables.title: Growth Analytics Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Constructs dashboards for tracking revenue and AI impact, integrating with Seismic's data systems for actionable insights

engagementSteps.title: Initial Assessment
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Research Seismic's blockchain operations and identify key pain points for sales infrastructure.

engagementSteps.title: System Development
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Build and prototype AI tools tailored to regulatory and partnership needs.

engagementSteps.title: Integration and Launch
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Integrate the new systems with Seismic's platform and launch for immediate use.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to optimize sales processes for blockchain companies like Seismic.

faqItems.question: How does it address regulatory challenges?
faqItems.answer: The system automates compliance checks specific to international blockchain standards.

faqItems.question: Is this customizable for our team size?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it's designed for small teams like Seismic's 16 employees.

faqItems.question: What tools will be integrated?
faqItems.answer: It integrates with Seismic's existing blockchain and AI tools for seamless operation.

faqItems.question: How long is the engagement?
faqItems.answer: Typically three months, with ongoing support available.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Improved partnerships and revenue growth based on AI-driven insights.

stackItems.name: Blockchain Platforms
stackItems.role: Secures data for financial transactions on Seismic's base layer

stackItems.name: AI Analytics Tools
stackItems.role: Analyzes market trends to support global promotion efforts

stackItems.name: CRM Systems
stackItems.role: Manages partnerships and tracks interactions in financial services

stackItems.name: Encryption Software
stackItems.role: Ensures on-chain privacy for app-level developments

stackItems.name: Data Dashboards
stackItems.role: Monitors revenue and compliance metrics in real-time
